video_prompt: The video shows a man giving a speech on a stage, wearing a blue blazer and white shirt. He is gesturing with his hands while speaking. The background is a red curtain with a TED logo. The man is the only character in the video, and he is speaking about avoiding flattening something and leaving it rich so he can grieve all of them.
